# Globex

Series-B logistics startup based in Austin. The discovery sprint surfaced two real opportunities — a real-time warehouse-occupancy dashboard and a forecasting model for inbound pallet volume. Globex's CTO is championing the build internally; sign-off is expected in the next quarter.

Growth tier reflects the runway-to-strategic; the current spend is modest relative to Acme.
